title: Hijmania

The Hijmania genus is part of the large and diverse Rubiaceae family, which includes over 13,000 known species. Hijmania species are known for their distinctive leaves and showy flowers, which are often used in traditional medicine. Hijmania is a relatively understudied genus, with many species still awaiting formal classification and description.
